channel.title: The Robotics Brief
channel.description: A daily podcast covering the latest in robotics and automation.
channel.itunes:author: Alex
channel.itunes:summary: A daily podcast covering the latest in robotics and automation.

item.title: The Robotics Brief — 2026-06-02
item.description: Exploring the forefront of AI, this episode uncovers methods to mitigate perceptual judgment bias in multimodal LLM-as-a-judge systems. Learn about RoboDream, which leverages compositional world models for scalable robot data synthesis, and ProtoAda's
item.itunes:summary: Exploring the forefront of AI, this episode uncovers methods to mitigate perceptual judgment bias in multimodal LLM-as-a-judge systems. Learn about RoboDream, which leverages compositional world models for scalable robot data synthesis, and ProtoAda's
item.itunes:subtitle: Exploring the forefront of AI, this episode uncovers methods to mitigate perceptual judgment bias in multimodal LLM-as-a-judge systems. Learn about RoboDream, which leverages compositional world models for scalable robot data synthesis, and ProtoAda's

item.title: The Robotics Brief — 2026-06-27
item.description: Explore groundbreaking approaches to robot learning, including DanceOPD's generative field distillation and scalable behavior cloning leveraging open data for complex behaviors. Discover how world action models facilitate continual imitation learning through recurrent generative
item.itunes:summary: Explore groundbreaking approaches to robot learning, including DanceOPD's generative field distillation and scalable behavior cloning leveraging open data for complex behaviors. Discover how world action models facilitate continual imitation learning through recurrent generative
item.itunes:subtitle: Explore groundbreaking approaches to robot learning, including DanceOPD's generative field distillation and scalable behavior cloning leveraging open data for complex behaviors. Discover how world action models facilitate continual imitation learning thro

item.title: The Robotics Brief — 2026-07-01
item.description: This week, dive into advanced world models for robotic manipulation, from disentangled video generation (DVG-WM) to adaptive latent models (AdaJEPA), making robots more efficient learners. Discover how Freeform Preference Learning and the Human-as-Humanoid approach enable robots to acquire complex skills, including zero-shot humanoid learning from human demonstrations. We also explore how metacognitive feedback elicits faithful uncertainty expression in LLMs, enhancing their reliability for future robotic integration. Tune in for the latest in embodied AI and intelligent control.
item.itunes:summary: This week, dive into advanced world models for robotic manipulation, from disentangled video generation (DVG-WM) to adaptive latent models (AdaJEPA), making robots more efficient learners. Discover how Freeform Preference Learning and the Human-as-Humanoid approach enable robots to acquire complex skills, including zero-shot humanoid learning from human demonstrations. We also explore how metacognitive feedback elicits faithful uncertainty expression in LLMs, enhancing their reliability for future robotic integration. Tune in for the latest in embodied AI and intelligent control.
item.itunes:subtitle: This week, dive into advanced world models for robotic manipulation, from disentangled video generation (DVG-WM) to adaptive latent models (AdaJEPA), making robots more efficient learners. Discover how Freeform Preference Learning and the Human-as-Humanoi

item.title: The Robotics Brief — Agents,
item.description: Discover how robots are achieving more intricate manipulation with a visual-tactile world action model and deploying embodied AI seamlessly across various platforms using a new portable runtime. We then explore the creation of controllable simulated agents
item.itunes:summary: Discover how robots are achieving more intricate manipulation with a visual-tactile world action model and deploying embodied AI seamlessly across various platforms using a new portable runtime. We then explore the creation of controllable simulated agents
item.itunes:subtitle: Discover how robots are achieving more intricate manipulation with a visual-tactile world action model and deploying embodied AI seamlessly across various platforms using a new portable runtime. We then explore the creation of controllable simulated agent

item.title: The Robotics Brief — 2026-07-13
item.description: Tune into The Robotics Brief for a deep dive into the latest advancements shaping AI and robotics. We uncover OpenCoF, which teaches AI to reason using video generation, and introduce DexVerse, a new benchmark for multi-task, multi-embodiment dexterous manipulation. Learn how AUTOPILOT VQA is setting standards for incident-centric dashcam understanding and how ContactMimic enables humanoids to interact robustly through contact control. Plus, explore ARDY's autoregressive diffusion model for generating incredibly interactive human motion.
item.itunes:summary: Tune into The Robotics Brief for a deep dive into the latest advancements shaping AI and robotics. We uncover OpenCoF, which teaches AI to reason using video generation, and introduce DexVerse, a new benchmark for multi-task, multi-embodiment dexterous manipulation. Learn how AUTOPILOT VQA is setting standards for incident-centric dashcam understanding and how ContactMimic enables humanoids to interact robustly through contact control. Plus, explore ARDY's autoregressive diffusion model for generating incredibly interactive human motion.

item.title: The Robotics Brief — Agents Learn
item.description: This week, The Robotics Brief explores cutting-edge research driving AI and robotics forward. We delve into procedural simulations enabling zero-demonstration self-driving cars and how AI agents can gauge task complexity. Learn
item.itunes:summary: This week, The Robotics Brief explores cutting-edge research driving AI and robotics forward. We delve into procedural simulations enabling zero-demonstration self-driving cars and how AI agents can gauge task complexity. Learn
